name: replay-diff-verify-fix
description: Agent replays a failed request and diffs the response to verify a fix
prompt: I fixed a database timeout bug on /api/orders. The proxy is running on port 8085 and I captured some failing traffic before the fix. Can you use apxy to replay the original failing request and diff the responses to prove the fix works?

checkpoints.description: Agent finds the failing traffic record
Agent diffs the old and new responses

outcome.description: Agent confirms the response changed from 500 to 200
